case_title: TAM, ALBERT M vs. WYLIE, MAXINE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, ALBERT M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WYLIE, MAXINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 WEBSTER ST, S.F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED
